name: Eggplant and Cheddar Omelet
recipeIngredient: 1 clove garlic or 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder, chopped if fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel eggplant and cut into small cubes.
2. Soak the cubes in a bowl of cold water for 30 minutes.
3. Remove, drain, and dry the eggplant well.
4. Heat 3 tablespoons olive oil in a skillet and add the eggplant.
5. Sauté the eggplant until it begins to brown.
6. Add tomato sauce and set the pan aside.
7. Heat the remaining olive oil (1 tablespoon) in a large skillet.
8. Add eggs and cheese to the skillet and cook over low heat until they set.
9. Spoon the eggplant mixture onto the center of the eggs and fold over to form an omelet.
